item.title: The Truth About Hollow Earth
item.description: Jim Wilhelmsen joins me to discuss Hollow Earth. He gets into how the Nazi's tie into this as well as Admiral Byrd. He also shares his Alien abduction story and much more.19th centuryIn 1818, John Cleves Symmes, Jr. suggested that the Earth consisted of a hollow shell about 1,300 km (810 mi) thick, with openings about 2,300 km (1,400 mi) across at both poles with 4 inner shells each open at the poles... Feed: https://rss.amperwave.net/v2/feed/podcorn/305c38e16dc14113698bedc4b8d3cfaa

item.title: [FORMAT POCHE] Simone de Beauvoir et Nelson Algren : un amant pour se sentir plus libre ?
item.description: C'est la femme forte, libre, par excellence. L'éminence féministe et existentialiste. Son fameux turban, ses grandes boucles d'oreilles et sa relation si spéciale avec Sartre. Mais Simone de Beauvoir a aimé un autre homme, avec une intensité toute particulière : Nelson Algren. Un podcast Bababam Originals Ecrit et raconté par Alice Deroide Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices Feed: https://feeds.megaphone.fm/BABA7112846821
